title: Trump Warns Iran the ‘Clock Is Ticking’ as Tensions Surge Again in Middle East
summary_full: The president has sought to force Iran to accept his terms on its nuclear program or else face renewed war. An emboldened Iran has rebuffed Trump’s demands.
summary_public: The president has sought to force Iran to accept his terms on its nuclear program or else face renewed war. An emboldened Iran has rebuffed Trump’s demands.

IR.label: negative
